block_01: For this Halloween’s special we have prepared an overview of the biggest stock market crashes of the 20th and 21st centuries. Stock market crashes strike fear not only because of all the losses they cause, but because they are so unpredictable. It is easy to overlook the premises of a crisis: when you least expect it, it comes out of nowhere and strikes the country, or even the whole world.
block_02: Though at the moment they are scary, in some cases horrifying experiences in the world’s history, they can leave positive legacies and teach the following generations. Here is a rundown of the five most notable stock market crashes in recent history.
block_03: Check the article to find out what happened in each of them and who was to blame.
